overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing characters walking through a neon-lit futuristic city street at night. The camera follows different pedestrians through an urban commercial district with towering buildings, digital billboards, and moderate vehicle traffic.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial street with large digital billboard

events.description: abrupt cut switches followed character from male in vest to female with blue mohawk

agents.ego_description: walking along orange-tiled sidewalk past parked vehicles and pedestrians

notable_agents.action: yellow sports car driving along the street with headlights on
pedestrian in red outfit walking toward camera

entered.detail: large vertical digital billboard displaying 'AVANTE' advertisement with boxing figure
distinctive orange patterned pedestrian walkway with geometric design
white and orange striped construction barrier wall with metal fencing
bright yellow futuristic sports car on the road

segments.scene_description: Opening segment following a character walking along a futuristic city street at night. A massive 'AVANTE' digital billboard towers overhead while a yellow sports car drives past on the left. The orange-tiled sidewalk and construction barriers line the right side of the frame.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway under digital gantries

events.description: entering covered area with overhead metal gantries and digital screens
cut switches to different male character with blonde hair and back patch

agents.ego_description: walking under overhead gantries with multiple digital screens, passing pedestrians with glowing umbrellas

notable_agents.action: pedestrian holding glowing purple umbrella walking toward camera
silver sedan driving with headlights on

entered.detail: metal framework with multiple digital screens displaying faces and advertisements
metal mesh catwalks and industrial ventilation structures overhead

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a more enclosed section of the street covered by overhead metal gantries displaying multiple digital screens. The environment feels denser with industrial metal grating overhead and pedestrians carrying glowing umbrellas passing by.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial storefront row with neon signage

events.description: cut returns to female character with blue mohawk
passing by vending machines and trash bins along the storefronts

agents.ego_description: walking past various storefronts including Fuyutsuki shop, vending machines, and neon-lit entrances

notable_agents.action: pedestrian browsing near blue vending machines
pedestrian with red umbrella walking along sidewalk

entered.detail: blue and white automated vending machines with glowing displays
green neon 'OPEN' sign in store window
wall with colorful graffiti and large skull artwork
large green industrial trash containers and discarded furniture

segments.scene_description: Walking past a row of commercial storefronts featuring the Fuyutsuki store, bright neon signs, and vending machines. The right side features graffiti-covered walls and urban clutter including trash bins, while pedestrians browse the various shop fronts.

events.description: street opens up to wider intersection with visible crosswalk markings
character begins crossing the street at the crosswalk

agents.ego_description: approaching intersection, waiting for traffic, then crossing the street at the crosswalk

notable_agents.action: black car driving through the intersection
small child walking ahead on the sidewalk toward the crosswalk

entered.detail: yellow and white striped pedestrian crossing lines on the road
pedestrian signal light showing walk symbol
tall buildings and neon signs visible down the street

segments.scene_description: The final segment opens into a wider urban intersection with visible crosswalk markings and traffic signals. The character approaches the crosswalk, waits for passing vehicles including a black car, then begins crossing the street as the pedestrian signal changes.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a neon-lit futuristic city street that transitions from an open thoroughfare into a dense commercial corridor before opening into a wide urban intersection. It begins by following a character past a towering AVANTE digital billboard and a passing yellow sports car, moving along an orange-tiled sidewalk lined with construction barriers. As the character advances, the environment becomes more enclosed under industrial metal gantries and glowing digital screens, where pedestrians with luminous umbrellas navigate the dense space. The scene then shifts toward a row of vibrant commercial storefronts and vending machines, passing graffiti-covered walls and urban clutter. Finally, the view expands into a broad intersection where the character waits for a black car to pass before crossing the street as the pedestrian signal changes.
